title: Sylvia Hu
compiled_truth: Sylvia Hu is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-14 to 2001-12-31), Sylvia Hu sent 131 and received 99 emails, totalling 230 interactions.
